synopsis: Star Wars Screen Entertainment was a product of LucasArts Entertainment Company and Presage Software Development, Inc., released in June 1994. It was a 3.5″ diskette, (and later as a CD-ROM as part of the The LucasArts Archives Vol. I collection), including different A New Hope–themed screen savers. It was was available for Windows operating system 3.1 or higher, as well as for Macintosh system 7.0 and above.
title: Star Wars Screen Entertainment
